symptom: Intermittent Microsoft 365 access and slow sign-in

findings.title: Public DNS server configured on endpoint
findings.impact: Internal service discovery and managed name resolution may fail.
findings.recommendation: Configure approved internal DNS resolvers and renew the client configuration.

findings.title: Recent Windows Update errors detected
findings.evidence: 14 update errors recorded in the previous 14 days
findings.impact: The endpoint may remain non-compliant and miss reliability fixes.
findings.recommendation: Review update events, proxy access, free space, and component-store health.

findings.title: Low disk capacity on C:
findings.impact: Servicing and application performance may be affected.
findings.recommendation: Review temporary data, logs, user data, and retention settings.

findings.title: Repeated event 1001 from Windows Error Reporting
findings.impact: A recurring application failure may be contributing to the reported symptom.
findings.recommendation: Correlate the event with the affected application and recent changes.

findings.title: Pending reboot detected
findings.recommendation: Schedule a controlled restart and rerun the assessment.

disclosure: This file contains synthetic data and is not evidence from a real customer environment.
